name: hamhead-ai
description: Ham-Head AI — Midwest Agentic Intelligence. 100 Days, 100 Apps.

scripts.docker:build: docker rmi -f hamhead-ai-server hamhead-ai-client 2>/dev/null; docker compose build
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose down && docker rmi -f hamhead-ai-server hamhead-ai-client && docker compose up --build -d
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
